summary: EXP-323 written: hedged-attribution patch to WIN-014 detail_evidence paragraph 2. Folds 'eight gravimeters across six Chinese sites' campaign description into same 2013 CJG attribution already cited for the null result; adds transparent qualifier that we have not independently verified the instrument/site totals. No verdict change. review_class=verification (batchable). Closes the c4/c5/c6 H8 / c7 H6 minor carry-forward.
